LYLA
HUANG.

Strategist → Builder

I used to shape messages. Now I shape the systems behind them.

projects.exe
01

(RE)ROUTE

What if navigation optimised for how you feel, not just where you go? Reimagining walking as an experience with routing for safety, discovery, and human-ness.

AIUX ResearchProduct DesignData
Barcelona
Master's Thesis · Prototype · On-going
VIEW PROJECT → 02

SNAPP

One word. One photo. One day. A shared visual diary of a city. Built through small, daily moments.

Product DesignFull-StackUXGamification
Barcelona
In use · Feb 2026

PLANMYTRIP

A planning tool that thinks like an editor, not a spreadsheet. Live weather, image search, and inline editing — all in one flow.

00:00:03INFORunning career.log...
00:00:04LOG[2015] SIGNAL_START — NUS graduate. Entered advertising.
00:00:04LOG[2015–17] HAVAS_SG — Scaled client IG 4000%. First award.
00:00:05LOG[2018–21] BLKJ_SENIOR — Senior Writer. Led 8 creatives.
00:00:05LOG[2021–22] GOOGLE_APAC — Partnered with 133 SMEs across APAC.
00:00:06LOG[2022–25] FREELANCE — 20+ clients. Strategy, copy, brand.
00:00:06WARN[2025–26] ELISAVA — Barcelona. Human Interaction & AI.
00:00:07OK[2026] BUILD_MODE — Products. Vibe coding. AI. // current

"I spent a decade turning noise into signal. Now I design the systems that create it."
00:00:12OKProcess complete. _
capabilities.dll

Strategy

  • Brand strategy & positioning
  • Consumer insights & research
  • Content strategy & messaging

Design

  • Product design (concept → prototype)
  • UI/UX design

Build

  • AI workflows & prompting
  • APIs, data, and integrations

Communicate

  • Writing & storytelling
  • Cross-functional collaboration
